auth.title: SubsTrack
auth.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace
auth.welcome_description: Sign in to your workspace to start collecting.
auth.account_not_configured: Account not configured. Contact your administrator.

signup.workspace_subtitle: Tell us about your business. You can change the display name later.
signup.tenant_code_hint: Lowercase letters and numbers only, no spaces. This is what your staff will use to sign in.

errors.tenant_code_length: Workspace code must be between 2 and 32 characters
errors.tenant_code_format: Workspace code can only contain lowercase letters and numbers
errors.tenant_code_taken: This workspace code is already taken

subscriptions.section_subtitle: Each plan is billed and paid separately.
subscriptions.empty: No plans yet — add one from the customer's edit screen.

customers.title: Customers
customers.no_customers_hint: Tap "+ Add" to add your first customer
customers.notes_placeholder: e.g. Router is on the third floor
customers.location_step_2: Find the customer's house and press the map to drop a pin.
customers.location_step_4: Come back here and paste the link below.
customers.location_placeholder: Paste the Google Maps link here
customers.deactivate_message: Are you sure you want to deactivate Customer {{name}}? They will be marked as inactive.
customers.reactivate_message: Are you sure you want to reactivate {{name}}?
customers.regular_hint: Regular customers are expected to pay every month
customers.delete_message: Delete {{name}}? If they have no payment history they will be permanently removed, otherwise they will be deactivated.
customers.bulk_pay_warn_multi: {{count}} on multi-month plans will be charged for their full duration.
customers.bulk_pay_skip_custom: {{count}} on custom plans will be skipped.
customers.bulk_pay_none: None of the selected customers can be quick-paid.
customers.bulk_delete_message: Delete {{count}} customers? Those with no payment history are removed permanently; the rest are deactivated.

plans.title: Plans
plans.delete_message: Delete "{{name}}"? Customers assigned to this plan will have their plan removed.
plans.delete_warning: Customers will keep their existing payment history
plans.no_plans_hint: Tap "+ New Plan" to create one
plans.bundle_price_hint: Total price for all months in this block
plans.bulk_delete_message: Delete {{count}} selected plan(s)? Customers assigned to them will have their plan removed.

users.title: Staff
users.no_staff_hint: Tap "+ Add Staff" to create one
users.username_invalid_chars: Only letters, numbers, dots, and underscores are allowed
users.delete_message: Delete {{name}}? If they have no recorded payments they will be permanently removed, otherwise they will be deactivated.
users.bulk_delete_message: Delete {{count}} selected staff member(s)? Those with no recorded payments are removed permanently; the rest are deactivated.
users.bulk_delete_skipped: {{count}} cannot be deleted by you and will be skipped.
users.bulk_delete_none: None of the selected staff members can be deleted by you.

payments.void_warning: {{monthYear}} will be marked unpaid. The original record stays in the audit log — voids cannot be undone.
payments.void_description: Voiding this payment will mark {{month}} {{year}} as unpaid. This action cannot be undone.
payments.void_confirm_message: This will mark {{month}} {{year}} as unpaid. The original payment will be retained in records.
payments.void_paid_plans_confirm_message: This marks {{month}} {{year}} as unpaid for every plan this customer paid this month. If a payment covers several months, that whole payment is voided. The records stay in history.
payments.inactive_customer_future: Cannot record future payments for inactive customers
payments.before_start_date: This month is before the customer's start date. No payment can be recorded here.
payments.inactive_future_blocked: This customer is inactive. Future month payments cannot be recorded for inactive customers.
payments.void_block_warning: {{blockRange}} will be marked unpaid. The original record stays in the audit log — voids cannot be undone.
payments.block_conflict_message: {{months}} already paid and will be skipped.
payments.enter_amount_to_enable_partial: Enter an amount above to enable partial payment.
payments.partial_debt_notice: The remaining {{amount}} will be added to this customer's debts. You can see it on the Debts page.
payments.amount_paid_exceeds_due: Amount paid cannot exceed amount due ({{due}})
payments.bulk_pay_apply_hint: This amount will be applied to each of the {{count}} selected months.
payments.bulk_pay_blocks_message: Pay {{count}} block(s) now? Already-paid months inside a block are skipped.
payments.bulk_void_message: Void {{count}} selected payment(s)? The records stay in the audit log — voids cannot be undone.

quick_pay.confirm_multi_month_message: This will record a payment of {{amount}} covering {{months}}.

admin.title: Admin
admin.tenant_code_hint: Lowercase letters and numbers only, no spaces

tenant_settings.title: Workspace Settings
tenant_settings.display_currency_hint: Amounts are shown to you in this currency. Stored values are unchanged.
tenant_settings.currencies_hint: Define non-USD currencies and their rate per USD.
tenant_settings.no_currencies_hint: Tap "+ Add" to add your first currency
tenant_settings.usd_base_note: USD is the base currency and cannot be edited.
tenant_settings.delete_message: Delete "{{code}}"? If it's used by any plan or payment, it will be hidden but kept for history.
tenant_settings.bulk_delete_message: Delete {{count}} selected currenc(ies)? Those used by a plan or payment are hidden but kept for history.
tenant_settings.deactivate_message: Hide "{{code}}"? It will be kept for history but no longer selectable for new plans or payments.
tenant_settings.inactive_currency_note: This currency is hidden because it's still referenced by existing records. Reactivate to use it again.

branches.section_hint: Create branches for multi-location businesses. Users and customers can be scoped to a branch.
branches.no_branches_hint: Tap "+ Add" to create your first branch
branches.delete_message: Delete "{{name}}"? If it's still in use, it will be hidden but kept for history.
branches.bulk_delete_message: Delete {{count}} selected branch(es)? Those still in use are hidden but kept for history.
branches.deactivate_message: Hide "{{name}}"? It will be kept for history but no longer selectable.
branches.inactive_branch_note: This branch is hidden because records still reference it. Reactivate to use it again.
branches.staff_needs_branch_hint: Staff users must be assigned to a branch.

settings.title: Settings
settings.restart_notice: The app will restart to apply the new language.
settings.sync_offline: No internet connection. Connect and try again.
settings.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
settings.developer_web_unavailable: The developer tools are only available on the mobile app.
settings.developer_import_hint: Paste a JSON export below. This will delete all local data and replace it with exactly what is in the JSON.
settings.developer_import_confirm_message: All current local data will be permanently deleted and replaced with the pasted JSON. This cannot be undone.

tenant_inactive.title: Organization Deactivated
tenant_inactive.message: Your organization's account has been deactivated. Please contact the service owner to resolve this.
tenant_inactive.contact_hint: If you believe this is a mistake, reach out to your SubsTrack administrator.

errors.requires_connection: This action requires an internet connection. Please reconnect and try again.
errors.workspace_switch_blocked: You have unsynced changes from the previous account. Please sign back into it and sync before switching accounts.
errors.account_deactivated: Your account has been deactivated. Contact your administrator.
errors.currency_code_invalid: Currency code must be 2-8 uppercase letters
errors.currency_usd_reserved: USD is the base currency and cannot be added
errors.currency_rate_invalid: Rate per USD must be a positive number
errors.currency_decimals_invalid: Decimals must be a whole number between 0 and 6
errors.currency_code_exists: A currency with this code already exists
errors.branch_last_active: Cannot delete the only active branch. Add another branch first.
errors.branch_name_exists: A branch with this name already exists
errors.username_invalid_chars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, dots, and underscores
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.staff_needs_branch: Staff users must be assigned to a branch
errors.admin_can_only_toggle_staff: Admins can only activate or deactivate staff users
errors.username_exists: A user with this username already exists
errors.plan_duration_invalid: Duration must be a whole number of at least 1
errors.multimonth_no_custom_price: Multi-month plans cannot use custom pricing
errors.plan_name_exists: A plan with this name already exists
errors.start_date_format: Start date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
errors.customer_needs_branch: Customer must be assigned to a branch
errors.amount_due_positive: Amount due must be greater than 0
errors.amount_paid_exceeds_due: Amount paid cannot exceed amount due
errors.billing_month_format: Billing month must be the first day of the month
errors.rate_snapshot_positive: Exchange rate snapshot must be positive
errors.plan_fixed_for_multimonth: Plan must have a fixed price to record a multi-month payment
errors.months_already_paid: The following months are already paid: {{months}}
errors.all_months_paid: All months in this block are already paid
errors.product_name_exists: A product with this name already exists
errors.sale_product_required: Pick a product to record this sale
errors.sale_quantity_invalid: Quantity must be a whole number of at least 1
errors.sale_amount_paid_invalid: Amount paid must be between 0 and the sale total
errors.debt_customer_required: Pick a customer for this debt
errors.debt_payment_no_debt: This customer has no outstanding debt to pay
errors.debt_payment_exceeds_debt: Amount is more than the customer owes
errors.tier_limit_reached: You've reached the {{resource}} limit ({{limit}}) for your current plan
errors.tier_multi_currency_locked: Multiple currencies are not available on your current plan
errors.tier_multi_month_locked: Multi-month plans are not available on your current plan

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.whatsapp_upgrade_message: Hello, I'd like to upgrade my SubsTrack plan to {{name}}.
subscription.whatsapp_upgrade_message_generic: Hello, I'd like to upgrade my SubsTrack plan.
subscription.confirm_upgrade_body: Your account will switch to the new plan immediately. You can change plans again later.
subscription.confirm_downgrade_body: You'll keep all your existing data but will be limited by the new plan going forward.
subscription.downgrade_blocked_body: Your current usage exceeds what {{name}} allows. Adjust the items below first:

locked.limit_reached_body: Your {{tierName}} plan allows up to {{limit}}. Upgrade to {{nextTierName}} to add more.
locked.multi_currency_body: Upgrade to {{nextTierName}} to manage currencies other than USD.
locked.multi_month_title: Multi-month plans are a paid feature
locked.multi_month_body: Upgrade to {{nextTierName}} to bundle multiple months into a single payment.
locked.contact_admin_body: This plan's limit has been reached. Contact your administrator to upgrade.

products.title: Products
products.no_products_hint: Add the items your business sells outside subscriptions.
products.delete_message: Delete "{{name}}"? If it has been sold before, it will be hidden but kept for history.
products.bulk_delete_message: Delete {{count}} selected product(s)? Those that have been sold are hidden but kept for history.

sales.title: Sales
sales.no_sales_hint: Tap to log your first one-off sale.
sales.no_sales_for_customer: No sales for this customer yet.
sales.void_reason_placeholder: Why are you voiding this sale?
sales.bulk_void_message: Void {{count}} selected sale(s)? The records stay in the audit log — voids cannot be undone.
sales.partial_debt_notice: This sale is not fully paid. The remaining balance appears in the Debts tab.

debts.description_placeholder: Optional — what is this debt for?
debts.no_debt_notice: This customer has no outstanding debt to pay.
debts.no_debts_hint: No outstanding debts match these filters.
debts.void_custom_message: Remove this custom debt? It stays in the audit log and can't be undone.
debts.void_payment_message: Remove this debt payment? The customer's debt total will go back up. This can't be undone.
debts.pay_message: Record a debt payment of {{amount}} for {{customer}}? This lowers the customer's debt total.
debts.pay_full_message: Record a debt payment of {{amount}} for {{customer}}? This clears their whole debt.
debts.no_transactions_for_customer: No transactions for this customer yet.
debts.history_empty_hint: Debts and payments will show here.

wallet.title: Wallets
wallet.empty_desc: This collector has handed over all their cash.
wallet.list_empty_desc: No one is holding cash to hand over right now.
wallet.receive_confirm_message: Mark this transaction as received from the collector?
wallet.receive_selected_confirm_message: Mark the {{count}} selected transactions as received from the collector?
wallet.receive_all_confirm_message: Mark all cash held by {{name}} as received?
